exceptions.risk_acceptance: Development-only use accepts the listed dependency vulnerabilities while Flux bootstrap fitness is evaluated; this is not production approval or a claim that the findings are unreachable.
compensating_controls: Run only in the local Colima/k3s lab without production data or production credentials.
Reconcile only repository-approved Git and OCI/Helm sources; do not process untrusted archives.
Do not expose the lab through a public Service or Ingress.
Rescan before renewal and whenever the pinned Flux distribution changes.
exceptions.replacement_plan: Replace with the first signed upstream Flux distribution whose exact arm64 image has no unapproved High or Critical findings, then remove this exception.
